ab: na vaik amen kati ama kivala tjay ama i Sakinu.
ch: 昨天我和爸爸去拜訪我的叔叔(sakinu)。
en: Yesterday, my father and I visited my uncle.

ab: na mapasaqetju a kula ni ama i Sakinu.
tjinumaljan amen tu na maberung tu ita berung a qaljiyu.
ch: 他告訴我們，房子的屋頂破了一個洞。
en: He told us that there was a hole in the roof of his house.

ab: ka ljemelaljelay timadju tua qaliyu na matjani a kemasi tua qaljiyu.
ch: 他在修理屋頂時，從屋頂摔下來了。
en: He fell off the roof while repairing it.

ab: na kemacu ti ama tua vutjulj a gung katua saviki tu sipavay tjay ama i Sakinu.
ch: 爸爸帶了牛肉和檳榔給叔叔(sakinu)。
en: My father brought beef and betel nuts for my uncle.

ab: masudju amen i qumaqan kati ama i Sakinu, pinaseljavakan aen tu liyaw a milimilingan.
ch: 我和叔叔(sakinu)在房間裡聊天，他分享了很多故事。
en: My uncle and I chatted in the room, and he shared many stories.

ab: ka uri vaik anag en ， kemazala ti ama i Sakinu tu na meqaca ngaen, tu tja vangsar anagen.
ch: 我要離開前，叔叔(sakinu)誇我長高了，也變得更帥氣了。
en: Before I left, my uncle praised me for growing taller and becoming more handsome.

ab: u ayain tiama i Sakinu: ‘’ nu menguaq anga su kula, pangtjezu anga matjanuamen a kivala。”
ch: 我說：「等叔叔(sakinu)腳好了，下次也來我們家玩。」
en: I said, "When your foot gets better, come to our house next time and visit us."
